description: User has an emergency plumbing issue, asks for a plumber, follows up on rates and availability

messages.content: I need a plumber urgently, pipe has burst

Right, let's get this sorted quick. Here are plumbers in the area who cover emergency call-outs:

- **Ahmed Plumbing Services** — covers Batley & Dewsbury, emergency available, call **07XXX XXXXXX**
- **Saddiq & Sons Plumbing** — Heckmondwike & Spen Valley, 24hr emergency, **07XXX XXXXXX**
- **A1 Plumbers Dewsbury** — rated 4.8/5, emergency jobs, **01924 XXXXXX**

Ring the emergency ones first — they'll come out same day. Turn your stopcock off in the meantime if you haven't already.
What's the going rate for an emergency call out?

For emergency call-outs in this area you're generally looking at **£80–£150** just to come out, then labour on top depending on the job. Burst pipes can vary a lot — a simple fix might be £150 all in, a bigger repair could be £300+.

The ones I listed should be able to give you a rough quote over the phone before they come out. Worth asking upfront so there's no surprises.

For a genuine emergency, cheap isn't always the move — a bodge job on a burst pipe will cost you more later. That said, if you want to shop around a bit:

- Try ringing all three I mentioned and ask for their emergency rate upfront
- Local Facebook groups like **Batley & Dewsbury Community** often have people recommending trusted cheaper tradespeople

Alternatively, if it's not actively flooding and you can contain it, a non-emergency call tomorrow will be half the price.
Is there anyone who covers Birstall?

Yes — Birstall is Spen Valley so the tradespeople covering that patch should reach you. **Saddiq & Sons** specifically lists Spen Valley in their area covered, so they're your best bet.

If none of those work out, let me know and I can see if there's anyone else on record.
